subcodes.first_line: O Javad! Thy petition hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and from the Dayspring of the Light of Divine Unity hath the answer been sent down. Render thou thanks and be thou steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جواد عریضه ات بساحت اقدس فائز و از مطلع نور احدیه جواب نازل ان اشکر و کن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech
